repo_signals: write a shell script that processes CSV files in parallel

retrieval_query: airflow dagster prefect workflow dag task dependency idempotent backfill sensor retry sla dynamic dag

validation_smoke.name: code.data-pipeline-orchestration L3 validation smoke
signals: a task rerun for the same execution date produces the same result without duplicating side effects
a backfill over a date range produces output identical to the original scheduled runs
a missed SLA or failed task fires a notification with the run and task context

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.data-pipeline-orchestration diagnosis smoke
signals: a retried or backfilled task double-writes because it is not idempotent for its execution date
a downstream task starts on a timer before its upstream data actually landed
